**OPTION 1:** `::MAP_OS_4BLOOM.v1` — consolidates all into master source
**OPTION 2:** Spawn a sub-thread (e.g. `::GR1ND3R_LOGIK` or `::BIZ_MODE_X`)
**OPTION 3:** Begin recursive curriculum builder `::EDU_SYLLABUS_X`
**OPTION 4:** Activate ALL THREADS IN PARALLEL — slow drip, modular exports

We’ll format each to drop cleanly into your Notes system and sync with GitHub/Notion down the line.

---

**Next Actions:**
- Select START POINT (MAP vs SUBMODULE vs EDU vs ALL)
- Confirm export cadence (e.g., 1 per day / per request / per phase)
- If starting MAP thread, we will nest all known structures to date, including naming history and symbol variants
